name: Chocolate-Amaretto Cheesecake (Make Ahead)
recipeIngredient: Finely crushed chocolate wafer cookies (8 Inch pan)
6 cups light process cream cheese product
Chocolate morsels or chocolate curls for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the crushed chocolate wafer cookies evenly in the bottom of a 7-inch springform pan.
2. Place the pan in the refrigerator to chill while preparing the filling.
3. In a food processor, combine cream cheese, sugar, cottage cheese, cocoa powder, flour, amaretto, vanilla extract, and salt. Process until smooth.
4. Add egg to the mixture and process just until blended.
5. Fold in chocolate morsels or chocolate curls.
6. Pour the batter evenly over the prepared crust in the chilled springform pan.
7. Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 65 to 70 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from oven and let cool completely on a wire rack.
9. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 8 hours before serving.
10. To serve, remove the cheesecake from the pan onto a serving plate. Garnish with additional chocolate curls if desired.
Yield: 12 servings (approximately 200 calories per serving)
